recommendations.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
recommendations.overview: After their late former Captain is framed, Lowrey and Burnett try to clear his name, only to end up on the run themselves.

recommendations.title: Bad Boys for Life
recommendations.overview: Marcus and Mike are forced to confront new threats, career changes, and midlife crises as they join the newly created elite team AMMO of the Miami police department to take down the ruthless Armando Armas, the vicious leader of a Miami drug cartel.

recommendations.title: Black
recommendations.overview: Mavela, 15 years old, is a Black Bronx. She falls madly in love with Marwan, an extremely charismatic member of a rival gang, the 1080s. The young couple is forced to make a brutal choice between gang loyalty and the love they have for one another. A

recommendations.title: Scarface
recommendations.overview: After getting a green card in exchange for assassinating a Cuban government official, Tony Montana stakes a claim on the drug trade in Miami. Viciously murdering anyone who stands in his way, Tony eventually becomes the biggest drug lord in the state

recommendations.title: Maria Full of Grace
recommendations.overview: A pregnant Colombian teenager becomes a drug mule to make some desperately needed money for her family.

recommendations.title: Traffic
recommendations.overview: An exploration of the United States of America's war on drugs from multiple perspectives. For the new head of the Office of National Drug Control Policy, the war becomes personal when he discovers his well-educated daughter is abusing cocaine within

recommendations.title: Running with the Devil
recommendations.overview: A leader of a drug cartel sends his two toughest henchmen to investigate why a shipment was botched.

recommendations.title: Pusher
recommendations.overview: A drug pusher grows increasingly desperate after a botched deal leaves him with a large debt to a ruthless drug lord.

recommendations.title: Cocaine Cowboys
recommendations.overview: In the 1980s, ruthless Colombian cocaine barons invaded Miami with a brand of violence unseen in this country since Prohibition-era Chicago - and it put the city on the map. "Cocaine Cowboys" is the true story of how Miami became the drug, murder and

recommendations.title: Leo
recommendations.overview: Parthiban, a cafe owner, lives with his family in Himachal Pradesh. Things take an absurd turn for him when he gets in the way of a drug cartel.
